channel.title: GitHub SCSS Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of SCSS in GitHub

item.title: black7375/Firefox-UI-Fix
item.description: 🦊 I respect proton UI and aim to improve it.

item.title: uswds/uswds
item.description: The U.S. Web Design System helps the federal government build fast, accessible, mobile-friendly websites.

item.title: pages-themes/cayman
item.description: Cayman is a Jekyll theme for GitHub Pages

item.title: sivan/heti
item.description: 赫蹏（hètí）是专为中文内容展示设计的排版样式增强。它基于通行的中文排版规范而来，可以为网站的读者带来更好的文章阅读体验。

item.title: jekyll/minima
item.description: Minima is a one-size-fits-all Jekyll theme for writers.

item.title: just-the-docs/just-the-docs
item.description: A modern, high customizable, responsive Jekyll theme for documentation with built-in search.

item.title: thingsym/hugo-theme-techdoc
item.description: The Techdoc is a Hugo Theme for technical documentation.

item.title: IanLunn/Hover
item.description: A collection of CSS3 powered hover effects to be applied to links, buttons, logos, SVG, featured images and so on. Easily apply to your own elements, modify or just use for inspiration. Available in CSS, Sass, and LESS.

item.title: abhinavs/moonwalk
item.description: A fast & minimal Jekyll blog theme with clean dark mode

item.title: sujaykundu777/devlopr-jekyll
item.description: (FREE SITE GENERATOR) - A Customizable/Hackable portfolio jekyll theme where you can blog using Markdown or CMS 🚀 in minutes built for developers. (with CMS) ✨

item.title: AboutRSS/ALL-about-RSS
item.description: A list of RSS related stuff: tools, services, communities and tutorials, etc.

item.title: Keldos-Li/typora-latex-theme
item.description: 将Typora伪装成LaTeX的中文样式主题，本科生轻量级课程论文撰写的好帮手。This is a theme disguising Typora into Chinese LaTeX style.

item.title: Ileriayo/markdown-badges
item.description: Badges for your personal developer branding, profile, and projects.

item.title: keyvanakbary/learning-notes
item.description: Notes on books I read, talks I watch, articles I study, and papers I love
